feed.title: Algorithm Agility for Bitcoin to maintain security in the face of quantum and classic breaks in the signature algorithms

entry.title: Algorithm Agility for Bitcoin to maintain security in the face of quantum and classic breaks in the signature algorithms
entry.summary: Ethan Heilman proposed a minimal alteration to the Taproot protocol, suggesting the introduction of a new version named "script spend only." This concept was shared within the Bitcoin Development Mailing List group, indicating ongoing discussions and considerations for future updates in the Bitcoin protocol. The proposal aims at enhancing or modifying the existing functionalities of Taproot, although specific details regarding the implications or technicalities of such a change were not provided in the message. This conversation reflects the continuous efforts and collaborative approach within the Bitcoin development community to refine and evolve the cryptocurrency's underlying technologies.
